case_title: SENNACA ELDER VS. JAMES P. ANTHONY, M.D. FACS, INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SENNACA ELDER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES P. ANTHONY, M.D. FACS, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
